executiveSummary.text: Rigetti is another listed quantum name trading on future possibility rather than current economics. At $14.36 with a market cap near $4.6B and negative EPS, the valuation still reflects thematic enthusiasm more than operating proof. Bottom line: REDUCE — SPECULATIVE . Quantum optionality is real, but the equity is still too dependent on sentiment and future milestones.

businessModel.text: Rigetti develops quantum computing systems and related services. The attraction is exposure to a potentially transformational computing platform. The challenge is that commercial adoption remains early and architecture competition remains unresolved.

financialSnapshot.text: Live price: $14.36 Market cap: $4.6B Day range: $14.14 – $15.41 P/E: N/A EPS: -$0.67 Beta: 1.82

recentCatalysts.text: Quantum sector enthusiasm remains the main sentiment driver. Technical milestones matter, but monetisation remains sparse. These names rerate on narrative faster than fundamentals.
items: Quantum sector enthusiasm remains the main sentiment driver.

thesisEvaluation.text: Bull (25%): quantum adoption accelerates and Rigetti captures meaningful credibility. Base (45%): thematic support persists but commercial reality lags. Bear (30%): sentiment cools and the stock derates sharply. Weighted conviction: 46/100.

keyRisks.text: Commercialisation risk: demand may remain shallow. Technology risk: no guarantee Rigetti’s path wins. Valuation risk: still priced on future possibility.

Valuation risk: still priced on future possibility.

whoShouldOwn.text: Should own: speculative investors deliberately taking quantum exposure. Should avoid: anyone seeking valuation discipline or earnings support.

recommendation.text: REDUCE — SPECULATIVE at $14.36. Interesting theme, poor valuation support.
